expectations.text: model_and_parts_created: Script creates a model with two shaft parts connected to ground via revolute joints
expectations.evidence: Model .gear_coupler created; input_shaft and output_shaft parts both created and connected to ground via constraint create joint revolute (.gear_coupler.rev_input and .gear_coupler.rev_output)

expectations.text: coupler_constraint_used: constraint create complex_joint coupler is used (must include 'complex_joint' sub-command)
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create complex_joint coupler' with coupler_name = .gear_coupler.coupler_gear is present

expectations.text: motion_multipliers_correct: motion_multipliers = 1.0, -0.333 (or equivalent 3:1 ratio with opposite direction)
expectations.evidence: motion_multipliers = 1.0, -0.333 — ratio |1.0/0.333| ≈ 3, negative sign gives opposite rotation direction

expectations.text: motion_generator_created: constraint create motion_generator is used on the input joint
expectations.evidence: 'constraint create motion_generator' with joint_name = .gear_coupler.rev_input is present

expectations.text: type_of_freedom_rotational: Motion generator specifies type_of_freedom = rotational
expectations.evidence: type_of_freedom = rotational in the motion_generator block

expectations.text: time_derivative_velocity: Motion generator specifies time_derivative = velocity
expectations.evidence: time_derivative = velocity in the motion_generator block

expectations.text: uses_havsin_not_step: HAVSIN function is used (not STEP or STEP5)
expectations.evidence: function = "HAVSIN(TIME, 0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 120D)" — HAVSIN used, no STEP or STEP5 anywhere
HAVSIN(TIME, 0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 120D) exactly matches the required argument order

expectations.text: converts_to_radians_or_uses_D: 120 degrees/s expressed correctly (as 120D or converted to rad/s)
expectations.evidence: 120D used in the HAVSIN expression — D suffix correctly denotes degrees in Adams

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape added to each shaft part
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape cylinder for .gear_coupler.input_shaft.cyl_shaft and .gear_coupler.output_shaft.cyl_shaft

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy
expectations.evidence: All markers, parts, joints, and constraints use full .gear_coupler.* dot-path names throughout
No adams_id found in the script

expectations.text: simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: 'simulation single_run transient' with end_time = 2.0, number_of_steps = 2000 is present

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: Adams run exited with code 0; the two 'ERROR:' matches in aview.log are inside Adams comment lines (prefixed with '!') — not actual Adams ERROR: messages
